name: Maple Coffee Ice-Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the coffee, maple syrup, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from the heat and pour over slightly beaten eggs, stirring constantly to combine.
4. Cook until the mixture thickens enough to coat the back of a spoon.
5. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
6. Pour into an ice-cream freezer or a tray of a mechanical refrigerator.
7. Partially freeze.
8. Gently fold in stiffly whipped evaporated milk.
9. Continue freezing until firm.
8 servings. Mrs. R. Leadly, Staten Island, N.Y.
